query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): Ô Saveurs Thaï and its website osaveursthai.com.
Optionnaly here is the address 22, Rue de la Barre, Lille, Hauts-de-France 59800, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary

Ô Saveurs Thaï is an independent establishment operating a single location in Lille, France. The business is managed by a single-shareholder legal entity (SASU) and shows no evidence of being part of a larger corporate group or franchise network. The total number of locations owned and operated by this entity is **1**.

### Detailed Analysis

**Corporate Affiliation and Ownership**
Ô Saveurs Thaï operates as an independent business founded by an individual named Thomas, driven by a passion for authentic Thai cuisine [Un restaurant, traiteur, qui propose des plats frais, colorés et ...](https://www.osaveursthai.com/). The primary contact for the business is directly tied to the founder via the email thomas@osaveursthai.com [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/). 

The restaurant is legally operated by the company "THOSU," which is structured as a Société par actions simplifiée à associé unique (SASU), indicating a single-shareholder ownership model [Ô Saveurs Thaï Lille - Restaurant (adresse, horaires, menu)](https://www.pagesjaunes.fr/pros/64666458). THOSU is registered under RCS Lille-Métropole with the company number 993 390 657 and holds a share capital of 10,000 EUR [Ô Saveurs Thaï Lille - Restaurant (adresse, horaires, menu)](https://www.pagesjaunes.fr/pros/64666458). While the restaurant operates in Lille, THOSU's corporate headquarters (siège social) is registered at 8 rue du Haut Vinage, 59290 Wasquehal [Ô Saveurs Thaï Lille - Restaurant (adresse, horaires, menu)](https://www.pagesjaunes.fr/pros/64666458). 

A recent BODACC notice (A n° 20260019) published on January 29, 2026, indicates a transfer of ownership for the establishment, noting that the Lille address was previously listed as the headquarters of the prior owner [Ô Saveurs Thaï Lille - Restaurant (adresse, horaires, menu)](https://www.pagesjaunes.fr/pros/64666458). There are no mentions of a parent company or franchise opportunities on the official website's primary pages [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/).

**Location and Operations**
The total location count for Ô Saveurs Thaï is **1**. The establishment is located at 22 rue de la Barre, 59000, Lille [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/). 

The official website does not feature a store locator and exclusively references this single Lille address [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/). The business functions as both a traditional restaurant and a catering service (traiteur) for private and professional events [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/). It offers on-site dining, takeaway, and delivery services, with the catering division operating under distinct hours (Monday to Saturday, 9:00 am – 7:00 pm) [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/). The restaurant can be contacted by phone at 03 20 51 23 45 [Accueil - Ô Saveurs Thaï](https://osaveursthai.com/).

While multiple other entities are registered at the 22 Rue de la Barre address—including a co-ownership syndicate (SIREN 353 392 236), a dental practice, and other hospitality businesses like "EURL JLD" and "LE P'TIT CUISTOT"—these represent distinct businesses sharing the same building rather than a consolidated restaurant group [22 RUE DE LA BARRE 59800 LILLE : Toutes les entreprises domiciliées 22 RUE DE LA BARRE, 59800 LILLE sur Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/entreprises/22_rue%20de%20la%20barre/59800_LILLE.html); [Société SYNDIC COPROPRIETE 22 RUE DE LA BARRE à LILLE (59800)](https://www.societe.com/societe/syndic-copropriete-22-rue-de-la-barre-353392236.html); [RUE DE LA BARRE 59800 LILLE : Toutes les entreprises domiciliées RUE DE LA BARRE, 59800 LILLE sur Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/entreprises/rue%20de%20la%20barre/59800_LILLE.html).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   While a transfer of ownership was recorded in January 2026, the specific identity of the previous owner and the exact terms of the transfer are not detailed in the provided findings.
*   The findings do not provide financial performance data or employee headcounts for the THOSU entity.
